title: Decision Density Card
prompt:
Create a production-ready Decision Density Card using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a compact decision summary where three evidence rows compress into a calm density meter, then expand one selected row into a concise rationale. The visual language is a white Bento card on #F4F5F6 with a #ECECEE border, 22px radius, soft neutral shadow, #111111 headings, and #4A4A4F supporting text. A single emerald density bar is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card, decorative charts without labels, or an interaction that depends on hover alone.

Use three real buttons in a labelled group; every row is at least 44px high, has aria-pressed, and exposes the chosen rationale through a polite live region. Click, Enter, and Space select a row. Hover may lift a row 2px in 180ms and press may compress it 1px in 90ms. Animate the selected row and emerald density bar with a stiffness 330, damping 27 spring; fade the rationale in over 180ms. The active row must remain visually identifiable without motion or color alone. Use local state only, with no timers, random values, storage, network calls, or remote content.

At 320px, stack the evidence rows without clipping the labels; at larger widths, preserve generous panel whitespace. Keep logical tab order, a visible 3px dark focus ring, and AA contrast. Prefer transform and opacity. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by using an instant selection or 120ms opacity fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
*/ .uiwiki-density{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-density button{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;min-height:44px;width:100%;margin-top:8px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-density i{display:block;width:78%;height:8px;margin-top:16px;border-radius:9px;background:#10b981;transition:width 180ms ease}.uiwiki-density button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-density button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-density *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [a,setA]=React.useState(0);const r=[['Reach','Broad signal',78],['Risk','Low cost',64],['Timing','Ready now',88]];return
DECISION DENSITYSignal summary{r.map((x,i)=>setA(i)} whileTap={{y:1}} style={{display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between',width:'100%',minHeight:38,marginTop:8,border:'1px solid #ececee',borderRadius:12,background:'#fff',fontWeight:800}}>{x[0]}{a===i?x[1]:'View rationale'})}
}return ;})()
